action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Bare, McCarville, Sheehan, Clancy, Stroud, Udell, Andraca, Arney, DeSmidt, Emerson, Hong, Hysell, Joers, Kirsch, Mayadev, Miresse, Palmeri, Rivera-Wagner, Sinicki, Stubbs, Tenorio, Vining and Brown; 
cosponsored by Senators Larson, Roys, Hesselbein, Spreitzer, Dassler-Alfheim, Pfaff, Ratcliff, Smith and Wirch
